flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at University of Mount Olive vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.8k vs 2.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Mount Olive rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.6k → $27.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Mount Olive rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.6k → $27.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Mount Olive fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
